ddls:
CREATE TABLE "public_health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data is recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data is recorded */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed deaths */,
  "cases_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in cases from the previous day */,
  "deaths_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in deaths from the previous day */,
  "hospitalization_total" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations */,
  "hospitalization_total_adult" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations for adults */,
  "hospitalization_total_pediatric" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations for pediatric patients */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "vaccinations_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in vaccinations from the previous day */,
  "testing_total" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "testing_positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "recovered_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in recovered cases from the previous day */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "active_cases_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in active cases from the previous day */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases that result in death */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this entry */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_data_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "household_median_income" REAL /* Median household income of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* URL to the state's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "household_median_income" REAL /* Median household income of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor or equivalent */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* URL to the county's official website */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate over the past year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public health data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES public_health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public health data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES public_health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public health data record being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., correction, addition) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the data */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the update (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES public_health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_information" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the hospital is located */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "emergency_capacity" INTEGER /* Emergency capacity of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the hospital's official website */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hospital's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hospital's location */,
  "beds_total" INTEGER /* Total number of beds */,
  "icu_beds_total" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds */,
  "ventilators_total" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators */,
  "emergency_wait_time" INTEGER /* Average emergency wait time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital data record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of beds occupied */,
  "icu_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds occupied */,
  "ventilators_used" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators used */,
  "patients_admitted" INTEGER /* Number of patients admitted */,
  "patients_discharged" INTEGER /* Number of patients discharged */,
  "icu_beds_available" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  "ventilators_available" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators available */,
  "icu_utilization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of ICU beds occupied */,
  "ventilator_utilization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of ventilators used */,
  "covid_patients_admitted" INTEGER /* Number of COVID patients admitted */,
  "covid_patients_discharged" INTEGER /* Number of COVID patients discharged */,
  "covid_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of beds occupied by COVID patients */,
  "covid_icu_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds occupied by COVID patients */,
  "covid_ventilators_used" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators used by COVID patients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospital_information ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "socioeconomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population (e.g., High School, Bachelor's) */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "median_income_per_capita" REAL /* Median income per capita */,
  "population_by_age_group" TEXT /* JSON object containing population by age group */,
  "population_by_gender" TEXT /* JSON object containing population by gender */,
  "population_by_race" TEXT /* JSON object containing population by race */,
  "employment_by_sector" TEXT /* JSON object containing employment by sector */,
  "health_insurance_coverage_rate" REAL /* Percentage of population with health insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socioeconomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public health data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous version of the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES public_health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
